title: CV6 6LN, Tom White Waste Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/AB3906CT/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Tom White Waste Limited Installation name: Tom White Waste Ltd, Longford No.2 Permit number: EPR/AB3906CT/V002  "
